calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
William Marchant, Esq. for Plaintiff: OTR, an Ohio general partnership.
Plaintiff's Witness: Linda Yang was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Steven Hotovec as follows:
Principal $2,381,561.16
Attorney's Fees $12,000.00
Costs $297.50, for a total of $2,393,858.66
Judgment signed in open court.
